prompt:
Goal: Create a cinematic horizontal Chinese solar-term poster for 惊蛰, blending refined PPT-style typography with a surreal macro spring landscape.

Canvas: 16:9 widescreen poster, soft high-resolution commercial advertising look, dreamy shallow depth of field, no border or watermark.

Visual concept: A vast translucent pink petal-like surface becomes a glossy wave of dew water, curling from the right-center toward the middle like a surfing wave. The palette is coral pink, peach, rose, warm white, and fresh spring green, with sparkling droplets, misty bokeh, and sunlit highlights. The scene should feel magical, delicate, premium, and poetic.

Layout: Place large white Chinese title text on the upper left: 惊蛰. To its right, add handwritten brush-style white calligraphy: 万物有声. Under the title, add three short lines of small elegant white Chinese body copy: 不是轰响提醒了春天，是沉睡太久的身体终于想动了。\n开窗换气，走一段路，少一点困乏，让心情跟着天气一起醒来。\n今日宜舒展、少熬夜、多喝水，把迟滞感轻轻抖落。. At the bottom center, add a thin horizontal rule with small spaced white text: 二十四节气 · 唤醒身体的信号.

Subject details: Include exactly 1 tiny human surfer wearing a yellow outfit and helmet, riding a small board inside the curling pink dew wave near the center-right. Include exactly 4 visible insects: 1 red-and-black ladybug at the lower left, 1 small bee near the upper right, 1 small bee on the right side of the wave, and 1 dark beetle-like insect near the lower right. Include exactly 4 green plant sprouts emerging from the pink surface: 1 taller sprout at the lower left, 1 central sprout, 1 tiny mid-background sprout, and 1 blurred sprout at the far lower right.

Style constraints: Use elegant Chinese editorial poster typography, soft glowing atmosphere, macro photography mixed with fantasy miniature world, ultra-detailed water droplets and transparent splash arcs, strong depth blur in foreground and background, clean negative space behind the upper-left text, harmonious spring color grading, premium social-media campaign aesthetic.
